title: brachyactis roylei
intro: Brachyactis roylei, also known as the Himalayan Rock Jasmine, is a flowering plant native to the Himalayas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Brachyactis roylei include reducing stress, improving sleep, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are typically consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
